heading: Today
text: Clouds and a few morning showers, then breaks of sun, especially south.  More numerous afternoon showers and thunderstorms, a few with gusty winds and hail.  Highs in the 70s north, near 80 south.  Winds variable to south up to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Scattered showers and storms tapering off.  Partial clearing, and areas of fog.  Lows in the 50s to around 60.  Winds diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Saturday
text: Areas of morning fog burning off to partly sunny skies.  A few localized afternoon showers, mostly through the north and mountains.  Highs in the 70s to low 80s.  Winds light and variable.
